metadata.title: DoD IL5 (NSS) Control Manifest - OSCAL Catalog (slim, metadata-only)

links.text: DoD Rev 5 SSP Addendum Controls (sheet ' IL5 (NSS)')

metadata.remarks: Slim metadata-only OSCAL catalog: each control has only id, title, family, and DoD-specific classification props (leveraged-from-fedramp-high, in-nist-high-baseline, profile-group, dod-parameter-override). For full control text, params, and assessment objectives, dereference the link to the NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 catalog or use the companion full-text catalogs (dod-ccsrg-il5-nss-catalog.json).
